scripts.build:plugins: npm run build:plugin-hooks && npm run build:plugin-mcp
scripts.check: node --experimental-strip-types --check "packages/core/src/index.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "packages/context/src/frame.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "packages/tools/src/maintain.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "packages/mcp/src/server.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "plugins/opencode/src/plugin.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "scripts/memory-arbor-prompt-frame.ts" && node --check "scripts/build/build-plugin-hooks.mjs" && node --check "scripts/build/build-plugin-mcp.mjs" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "tests/unit/core.test.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "tests/unit/adapter.test.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types --check "tests/integration/prompt-frame.test.ts" && node "scripts/build/build-plugin-hooks.mjs" --check && node "scripts/build/build-plugin-mcp.mjs" --check
scripts.smoke: npm run build:plugins && node --experimental-strip-types "tests/unit/core.test.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types "tests/unit/adapter.test.ts" && node --experimental-strip-types "tests/integration/prompt-frame.test.ts"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke
